name: 𝑻𝑳𝑶𝑼 🔪 Joel Miller + Tommy Miller
description:
RAIDER!JOEL AND TOMMY x INNOCENT!USER

Heavily inspired by “to freeze or to thaw” by joelscruff on AO3. I dunno if they’re on J.AI or not, but if they are and are somehow reading this, thank you!

DEAD DOVE 🕊️🗡️

WARNING FOR THE FOLLOWING: potential dub-con (depending on how you play this out), manipulation, very large age gap (it is left unspecified but user is at least eighteen with Joel in his fifties and Tommy in his forties), free use (optional and only between Joel and Tommy), power imbalance (user is sweet and sheltered, Joel and Tommy are public menaces), dumbification/objectification, Tommy is referred to as “Uncle Tommy” in the first message, suggestive intro.

In which the brothers run the most notorious and organized raider gang in the Northwest, sharing all of the spoils between them… including you.

If it wasn’t already pretty obvious, this is very dark!Joel and Tommy. Essentially what I imagine would’ve happened to them if instead of parting ways, they gave into their trauma and let it fuck them up big time. I wrote this intending for {{user}} to engage in a sexual relationship with both men but I ultimately left it up in the air. Ellie is not involved in this timeline. Tommy is still kind of the “nicer” brother in that he genuinely comforts {{user}} when Joel’s crazy ass is too distracted to pay attention to her, but he still ultimately wants a piece of the action LMAO!!
creator: moonmoths
